recentTweets.text:
Trump’s election claims last night were self-serving, dangerous, and put our democracy at risk.

And the ‘SAVE’ Act won’t protect our elections—it’s a voter suppression bill that creates more barriers to the ballot box.

Today, I remember my dear friend and colleague, Congressman John Lewis, and recommit to getting into “good trouble” in defense of our democracy. 

Thank you, John. We will carry your legacy forward.

Todd Blanche’s terrible leadership of Trump’s corrupt DOJ, has already put Americans at risk. 

He’s only loyal to Trump’s agenda - not the rule of law.

The Senate must reject his confirmation.
The Black community has made incredible progress since the civil rights era, but it’s people like this that want to take us back👇🏾

Acting CFPB Director Vought doesn’t know what the Office of Minority and Women Inclusion (OMWI) is— how embarrassing.

Every community deserves a seat at the table. The CFPB is required to have an OMWI, and I’m not letting this administration neglect people who need equitable https://t.co/i29MXWnR8M

They can put Trump on a $1 coin, but can’t keep a decades-old promise to put Harriet Tubman on the $20 bill???

This Treasury is funding presidential vanity projects.

Why does Trump’s Department of War get $350 billion while families face SNAP cuts, healthcare losses, and higher prices?

Who is this budget really for?

High interest rates and rising housing costs are putting homeownership further out of reach for working families. 

Today in the Financial Services Committee, I pressed Fed Chair Kevin Warsh on the Fed's role in mortgage affordability — because all Americans deserve a fair shot https://t.co/32z9KJt8ij
Join us for Mobile Office Hours this Thursday, July 16, from 12 PM to 2 PM at Bexley City Hall (2242 E. Main St., Bexley, OH 43209). 📞 We’re here to help—no appointment needed!
So DEI is wrong, but nepotism and corruption aren’t?

Don’t mess with Columbus.

Federal funding shouldn’t depend on loyalty to Donald Trump.
The power of the purse belongs to Congress and Congress ONLY.

‼️BIG WIN: Six of my bills became law this weekend as part of the historic bipartisan housing act!

This legislation puts Americans first by increasing housing supply, preventing foreclosures, and expanding access to affordable housing for working families.🏠
With hope, there’s nothing we can’t achieve. https://t.co/f1eus1IoOH
Generational fights require generational courage. https://t.co/33P4gSLCao
Finally, we can begin to ease the housing crisis for the American people.
RT @TheLastWord: TONIGHT: @RepBeatty joins @CapehartJ on The #LastWord. Tune in! https://t.co/ehVcQNLcEF

Trump is meddling in our midterm elections!!

His games won’t stop Democrats from taking back the House in November.
Republicans (the ‘pro-family’ party) betrayed America’s children. ⬇️

LET’S GO, OHIO! 

Proud to represent the Buckeye State. We’re just getting started.💪🏾
RT @RepJamesClyburn: The Trump administration supports changing the law to create a $250 bill with Trump’s face on it, but doesn’t think Ha…
There’s nothing patriotic about white supremacy. https://t.co/qWWVoAeio9

The Trump administration is going after the Georgia election workers who did their jobs and upheld election integrity.

This is beyond being a sore loser—it’s corruption.
RT @darreldrowland: Columbus Congresswoman Joyce Beatty, who championed the Tubman portrait, ain't gonna be happy with this...
The Trump effect: ugly, gaudy, and unlawful. https://t.co/cvUcFVuWXT

RT @DemWomenCaucus: Trump is trying to destroy America's institutions and history. 

DWC Leader @RepBeatty is not going to let that happen.

Republican health care cuts caused Ohio’s ACA enrollment to drop by over 32%—the highest decline in the country.

Ohio families are losing health coverage while Trump demands $350 billion for his War Department.

Trump is actively trying to destroy American institutions.

We won’t let him.

When our leadership enables white supremacy, this is the result.

Racism. Terror. And all in the name of patriotism.

History is being written. It’s up to us to decide which side of it we’ll be on. 

🔗 Full story here: https://t.co/Qiw7EMnP2A https://t.co/tcPOGQdxPs
Wishing you all a joyful Fourth of July, filled with reflection, gratitude, and a renewed commitment to fighting for the American Dream that everyone deserves. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/ZJVgoc4Cxi

The fight for justice continues. 

For me, it’s more than protecting the Kennedy Center — it’s about protecting our democracy. 

https://t.co/djx2F95EOJ

Happy 250th birthday, America!

Today, we celebrate the anniversary of our nation’s founding, built by the sacrifices, labor and contributions of Black Americans.

While we have made progress towards our country’s promise - that all men are created equal - we must continue the https://t.co/L0Tvzh838S

Proud to celebrate our 3rd Annual Financial Education Resource Fair at the Capitol w/@RepYoungKim.

As Co-Chair of the Financial Literacy and Wealth Creation Caucus, I’m grateful to the 33 financial institutions, nonprofits, and partners who joined us to connect attendees with https://t.co/xCIORa9qU9

First, the East Wing, the Kennedy Center, and now this. 

Our communities are not Trump’s playground.

While Republicans stripped healthcare from millions of Americans, Trump got $2 billion richer just this year.

Corruption has a cost - and families are paying it.
Shameful.

Birthright citizenship PROTECTED. 💪🏾🇺🇸

Born from the promise of the 14th Amendment and created to protect the children of formerly enslaved Americans, birthright citizenship is a cornerstone of American democracy.

Trump can’t erase that.
The future of safe affordable housing is nothing to yawn at. https://t.co/VXrFubvhq3
The damage Trump has done is not irreparable. https://t.co/Bxg2lajgfQ

Trump has had nearly a week to sign into law groundbreaking bipartisan housing reform. But he’s putting partisanship over working people.  

Trump is stalling, while families are struggling.
RT @JakeSherman: CBC responds to Slotkins call for new leadership.
RT @TheBlackCaucus: Statement in response to recent comments regarding House Democratic leadership by Sen. Elissa Slotkin: https://t.co/q7Y…
RT @TheLastWord: TONIGHT: @RepBeatty joins @CapehartJ on The #LastWord. Tune in! https://t.co/RbAwQSxquq
Republicans have to rely on racist redistricting maps, because they know they can’t win fairly.

Today’s Supreme Court decision is devastating for Haitian families seeking safety.

The Haitian community in Central Ohio isn’t a talking point to me, they’re my neighbors. 

They deserve dignity, not fear. I’ll never stop standing with them.

https://t.co/G05AFao5ET

Republicans are allowing their petty drama to stand in the way of real progress and housing reform for Americans.

It’s clear where their priorities lie.

An ugly tarp won’t make us forget what Trump did. 

Take it down, and let Americans enjoy The Kennedy Center again. https://t.co/sdQF6XYnCa

Today marks four years since Roe v. Wade was overturned. Let’s be clear: abortion is health care, and everyone deserves the right to choose. 

As a proud @ReproCaucus Member, today and every day, I trust you — not Republicans — to make decisions about your body.
It isn’t there. Hope that helps🙏🏽
Victory is ours. But the fight continues. More here🔗https://t.co/IbydkmV9an https://t.co/Rn7NEB4A3b

✨ Join me at our Financial Resource Fair at the Capitol next Tuesday to chat with financial institutions, nonprofits and more for resources and expert guidance to help you thrive. See you there! 💸🤍 https://t.co/GclReMb4i4

No tarp can cover up what Trump has done. More below👇🏾
https://t.co/NphEW7qHF1
STAY WOKE✊🏾✨ https://t.co/fv03VN0zZl
RT @atrupar: Rep. Joyce Beatty: "I can tell you his name has been removed, and we are certainly standing up against this tarp to have it al…

RT @MacFarlaneNews: "There are difficult cases. This is not one of them."

Rep. Joyce Beatty (D-OH), Kennedy Center board member, files lat…
RT @DispatchAlerts: Photos: Joyce Beatty, Roland Martin speak at State of Black America panel https://t.co/Fv0baNk99G
RT @DispatchAlerts: Joyce Beatty praises removal of Trump's name from Kennedy Center https://t.co/FHRYZhG7Tn
TAKE. DOWN. THE. TARP. https://t.co/FEzGmhrGcw

assessment.posture: No captured Kurdistan social posture yet
assessment.summary: The local archive has not captured a tweet from this account that matches TOR Phi's Kurdistan Lens terms yet. Capture more timeline pages and targeted Kurdistan searches before drawing a social-media conclusion.
assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.

The Trump admin has consistently tried to strip voting rights from Americans. But our courts are pushing back.

This is a WIN for the rule of law and democracy.💪🏽

The Republican ‘Big Ugly Bill’ slashed SNAP. Now, Americans are going hungry.

PROTECT SNAP.
Happy Black Girl Dad Week!💪🏾👧🏽

Happy Father’s Day, America! I am forever thankful to my dearest Otto for being a phenomenal father and husband.

Today, we celebrate and remember the incredible dads and father figures that contribute kindness, support, and humor to their families. Their love will always be https://t.co/IhIBQg7DI3
Happy Juneteenth!✊🏾🇺🇸 https://t.co/5dZraxhivv
Juneteenth reminds us that the fight for freedom is ongoing — every single day. https://t.co/pixUBirrCS

Ahead of Juneteenth, I convened a roundtable with local civic, faith, student and community leaders from throughout Ohio’s Third Congressional District to discuss important issues affecting our community. 

Together, we discussed ideas and strategies to combat voter suppression https://t.co/7j0mUn9Hw3

Happy Juneteenth, America!

Today, we honor our country’s freedom day, when enslaved Black Americans were emancipated from slavery.

May we continue to honor this legacy, in our continued fight for voting rights, equity, and beyond.✊🏾 https://t.co/dY3Dkp27uT

A day to remember.☀️

Congratulations to the Obamas! https://t.co/QoCjiSurQj
Thanks for the invite, @BarackObama!🇺🇸 https://t.co/ajEEpmWF5W
Trump has completely fumbled Iran - and Americans had to foot the bill for every cent of it.

Don’t let Republicans distract you with UFC fights and ballroom drama.

They literally took food from babies.
Fear has no place here. https://t.co/nRobOiMpvy
The rule of law prevailed. https://t.co/rDgaBSAXuO

He lied.
